name: Mrs Fields Lemon Macadamia Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 150°C.
2. In a medium bowl, combine flour, baking soda, and salt. Mix well and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, blend sugars with an electric mixer on medium speed until smooth.
4. Add the butter and cream cheese, mixing to form a smooth paste.
5. Add the egg and lemon extract, beating at medium speed until light and soft.
6. Scrape down sides of the bowl occasionally.
7. Gradually add the flour mixture and nuts, blending just until combined.
8. Do not overmix.
9. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto ungreased cookie sheets, 2 inches apart.
10. Bake for 23-25 minutes.
11. Immediately transfer to a cool flat surface.
